Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining UBS' third quarter earnings call.
We delivered strong results this quarter, with revenue up 8 percent year over year.
Our wealth management division continued to attract net new money in line with our targets.
However, we see headwinds in the investment bank, where market volatility weighed on client activity.
Cost discipline remains a top priority and we are on track with our integration synergies.
With that, I will hand over to the CFO for a deeper look at the numbers.
